# TBML Risk Assessment Notes

Personal analysis of trade-based money laundering risk indicators observed in recent transaction patterns. These are working hypotheses, not verified facts.

## Content

Over/under-invoicing patterns in commodity trades between jurisdictions with weak AML controls suggest potential TBML activity. Further investigation needed before escalating.
